span.p:
Client
---
POST /upload
multipart/form-data or JSON+base64
Max size: 10 MB
Allowed: jpg, png, gif, webp

rect.style: fill: rgb(30, 58, 95) !important; stroke: rgb(59, 130, 246) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1e3a5f, #9fc2e1); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-3b82f6, #459ff6);

div.style: color: rgb(191, 219, 254) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-bfdbfe, #a0d2fe);

span.p:
API Gateway HTTP API v2
---
Route: POST /upload
Protocol: HTTPS, TLS 1.2+
Payload format: 2.0
CORS: enabled
Stage: default, auto-deploy
Throttling: 10,000 rps
Access logs to CloudWatch

rect.style: fill: rgb(59, 31, 15) !important; stroke: rgb(249, 115, 22) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-3b1f0f, #d1cdc7); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-f97316, #fa7f2a);

div.style: color: rgb(255, 237, 213) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-ffedd5, #ffddaf);

span.p:
uploads/ prefix
---
Stores: original images
SSE: AES-256
Versioning: enabled
Lifecycle: expire after 30 days
Access: fully private
On ObjectCreated fires SQS notification

rect.style: fill: rgb(59, 31, 15) !important; stroke: rgb(249, 115, 22) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-3b1f0f, #d1cdc7); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-f97316, #fa7f2a);

div.style: color: rgb(255, 237, 213) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-ffedd5, #ffddaf);

span.p:
processed/ prefix
---
Stores: cropped circular PNGs
SSE: AES-256
Output: 40x40 px, PNG, transparent bg
Lifecycle: expire after 90 days
Access: fully private

rect.style: fill: rgb(74, 29, 150) !important; stroke: rgb(167, 139, 250) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-4a1d96, #986be2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-a78bfa, #9c7df9);

div.style: color: rgb(237, 233, 254) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-ede9fe, #cabffc);

span.p:
Main Queue
---
Name: image-processor-env-image-queue
Type: Standard
Visibility timeout: 360 s (6x Lambda timeout)
Retention: 1 day
Long polling: 20 s
Max receives before DLQ: 3

rect.style: fill: rgb(74, 29, 150) !important; stroke: rgb(167, 139, 250) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-4a1d96, #986be2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-a78bfa, #9c7df9);

div.style: color: rgb(237, 233, 254) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-ede9fe, #cabffc);

span.p:
Dead-Letter Queue
---
Name: image-processor-env-image-dlq
Retention: 14 days
CloudWatch alarm on any visible message

rect.style: fill: rgb(30, 58, 95) !important; stroke: rgb(59, 130, 246) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1e3a5f, #9fc2e1); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-3b82f6, #459ff6);

div.style: color: rgb(191, 219, 254) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-bfdbfe, #a0d2fe);

span.p:
Internet Gateway
---
Attached to VPC
Entry point for inbound
public traffic

rect.style: fill: rgb(28, 25, 23) !important; stroke: rgb(132, 204, 22) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1c1917, #d8d5cf); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-84cc16, #a8eb42);

div.style: color: rgb(217, 249, 157) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-d9f99d, #d2f88a);

span.p:
NAT Gateway A
---
Elastic IP: allocated
Routes outbound traffic
for private subnet AZ-a

rect.style: fill: rgb(28, 25, 23) !important; stroke: rgb(132, 204, 22) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1c1917, #d8d5cf); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-84cc16, #a8eb42);

div.style: color: rgb(217, 249, 157) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-d9f99d, #d2f88a);

span.p:
NAT Gateway B
---
Elastic IP: allocated
Routes outbound traffic
for private subnet AZ-b
High-availability fallback

rect.style: fill: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; stroke: rgb(34, 197, 94) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-14532d, #9ce7ba); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-22c55e, #4ae081);

div.style: color: rgb(220, 252, 231) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-dcfce7, #b8f9ce);

span.p:
upload-lambda
---
Runtime: nodejs20.x
Memory: 256 MB — Timeout: 30 s
Handler: index.handler
Env: S3_BUCKET, UPLOAD_PREFIX
Deps: @aws-sdk/client-s3, busboy, uuid
IAM: s3:PutObject on uploads/ only
Logs: /aws/lambda/...-upload

rect.style: fill: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; stroke: rgb(34, 197, 94) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-14532d, #9ce7ba); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-22c55e, #4ae081);

div.style: color: rgb(220, 252, 231) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-dcfce7, #b8f9ce);

span.p:
crop-lambda
---
Runtime: nodejs20.x
Memory: 512 MB — Timeout: 60 s
Handler: index.handler
Env: S3_BUCKET, PROCESSED_PREFIX
Deps: @aws-sdk/client-s3, sharp 0.33
Crop: resize 40x40 cover, SVG circle mask
Output: PNG with transparent alpha
IAM: s3:GetObject uploads/, s3:PutObject processed/
SQS: ReceiveMessage, DeleteMessage, ChangeVisibility
Logs: /aws/lambda/...-crop

rect.style: fill: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; stroke: rgb(34, 197, 94) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-14532d, #9ce7ba); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-22c55e, #4ae081);

div.style: color: rgb(220, 252, 231) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-dcfce7, #b8f9ce);

span.p:
upload-lambda replica AZ-b
---
Identical config to AZ-a
Lambda auto-distributes ENIs
across both private subnets

rect.style: fill: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; stroke: rgb(34, 197, 94) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-14532d, #9ce7ba); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-22c55e, #4ae081);

div.style: color: rgb(220, 252, 231) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-dcfce7, #b8f9ce);

span.p:
crop-lambda replica AZ-b
---
Identical config to AZ-a
Lambda auto-distributes ENIs
across both private subnets

rect.style: fill: rgb(12, 35, 64) !important; stroke: rgb(56, 189, 248) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-0c2340, #d0ccc6); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-38bdf8, #42c0f8);

div.style: color: rgb(186, 230, 253) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-bae6fd, #9ddcfc);

span.p:
S3 Gateway Endpoint
---
Type: Gateway — free, no ENI
Service: com.amazonaws.us-east-1.s3
Injected into private subnet route tables
Policy: s3:GetObject and s3:PutObject
scoped to the images bucket only

rect.style: fill: rgb(12, 35, 64) !important; stroke: rgb(56, 189, 248) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-0c2340, #d0ccc6); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-38bdf8, #42c0f8);

div.style: color: rgb(186, 230, 253) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-bae6fd, #9ddcfc);

span.p:
SQS Interface Endpoint
---
Type: Interface — ENI per AZ
Service: com.amazonaws.us-east-1.sqs
Private DNS: enabled
Deployed in: priv-a, priv-b
SG: sg-vpce-sqs
Inbound TCP 443 from sg-upload-lambda
Inbound TCP 443 from sg-crop-lambda

rect.style: fill: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; stroke: rgb(250, 204, 21) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1f2937, #cdc8c2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-facc15, #fad029);

div.style: color: rgb(254, 249, 195) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-fef9c3, #fdf6a3);

span.p:
Role: upload-lambda-role
---
AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
AWSLambdaVPCAccessExecutionRole
s3:PutObject scoped to uploads/ only

rect.style: fill: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; stroke: rgb(250, 204, 21) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1f2937, #cdc8c2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-facc15, #fad029);

div.style: color: rgb(254, 249, 195) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-fef9c3, #fdf6a3);

span.p:
Role: crop-lambda-role
---
AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
AWSLambdaVPCAccessExecutionRole
s3:GetObject on uploads/
s3:PutObject on processed/
sqs: ReceiveMessage, DeleteMessage
GetQueueAttributes, ChangeMessageVisibility

rect.style: fill: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; stroke: rgb(148, 163, 184) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1f2937, #cdc8c2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-94a3b8, #b0a99f);

div.style: color: rgb(226, 232, 240) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-e2e8f0, #c9d7e3);

rect.style: fill: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; stroke: rgb(148, 163, 184) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1f2937, #cdc8c2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-94a3b8, #b0a99f);

div.style: color: rgb(226, 232, 240) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-e2e8f0, #c9d7e3);

rect.style: fill: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; stroke: rgb(148, 163, 184) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1f2937, #cdc8c2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-94a3b8, #b0a99f);

div.style: color: rgb(226, 232, 240) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-e2e8f0, #c9d7e3);

span.p:
Log Group
/aws/apigateway/...
Retention: 14 days
Format: JSON access log

rect.style: fill: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; stroke: rgb(148, 163, 184) !important; stroke-width: 2px !important; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1f2937, #cdc8c2); --darkreader-inline-stroke: var(--darkreader-text-94a3b8, #b0a99f);

div.style: color: rgb(226, 232, 240) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px; --darkreader-inline-color: var(--darkreader-text-e2e8f0, #c9d7e3);

span.p:
CloudWatch Alarm: dlq-messages-alarm
---
Metric: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
Namespace: AWS/SQS
Period: 60 s — Threshold: above 0
Action: notify via SNS topic
